zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bruyn於大約1382年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿洛時，她的父親Sir Ingram Bruyn30歲，母親Elizabeth de la Pole21歲。她於大約1425年與Sir Nicholas Burdett在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1466年享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bruyn于大约1382年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿洛时，她的父亲Sir Ingram Bruyn30岁，母亲Elizabeth de la Pole21岁。她于大约1425年与Sir Nicholas Burdett在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1466年享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bruyn was born about 1382, in Arrow, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Ingram Bruyn, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth de la Pole, was 21. She married Sir Nicholas Burdett about 1425, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1466, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bruyn est née environ 1382, à Arrow, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ingram Bruyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de la Pole, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Burdett environ 1425, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1466, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bruyn um 1382 in Arrow, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ingram Bruyn 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de la Pole 21. Sie hat um 1425 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Nicholas Burdett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 85 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bruyn è nata il circa 1382 nel Arrow, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ingram Bruyn, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de la Pole, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Burdett circa 1425, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1466, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bruynが約1382年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアローで生まれた時，父Sir Ingram Bruynは30歳，母Elizabeth de la Poleは21歳であった。約1425年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでSir Nicholas Burdettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1466年に85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bruyn(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 워윅실르 아로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ingram Bruyn(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de la Pole(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sir Nicholas Burdett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bruyn nasceu aproximadamente 1382, em Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ingram Bruyn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de la Pole, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas Burdett aproximadamente 1425, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1466, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bruyn родилась около 1382 г. в местности арроу, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ingram Bruyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de la Pole, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Burdett около 1425 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1466 г. в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bruyn nació aproximadamente 1382, en Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ingram Bruyn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de la Pole, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas Burdett aproximadamente 1425, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1466, a la edad de 85 años.
